identity.mission: Create a HIPAA-compliant, professional, and trust-inducing interface that balances density with clarity.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Clinical Precision with SaaS Fluidity.
Emotion First: Trust and Efficiency are the core emotions.
Content is King: Patient data and status must be instantly readable.
Zoom In: Focus on critical metrics (Leads, Orders).
Negative Space: Use whitespace to prevent data fatigue.

headings.usage: Page titles, Section headers, Metric values

mono.usage: HCPCS Codes, SSN fragments, Order IDs

gradients.forbidden: No full-screen gradients. No dark gradients.
gradients.allowed: Subtle mesh gradients in light mode for empty states only.

grid_strategy.dashboard: Bento Grid (Mode A) - Asymmetric layout for metrics.
grid_strategy.data_tables: High Density Grid (Mode B) - Compact rows for Patient/Order lists.

layout.container_rules: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).

customization_rules: Border Radius: sm (rounded-sm) or md (rounded-md) for a professional, crisp look.
Shadows: Subtle, diffuse shadows (shadow-sm). Avoid heavy drop shadows.
Cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800).
Buttons: Sharp or slightly rounded. Primary button uses Navy Base.

specific_components.tables: Use 'Table' component. Dense padding. Zebra striping optional but recommended for long lists.
specific_components.forms: Use 'Form', 'Input', 'Select'. Labels must be clear and bold (font-medium).

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use sparingly for sticky headers or overlays (backdrop-blur-md, bg-white/80).
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid borders are preferred over shadows for defining structure.
visual_enhancers.textures: Avoid heavy noise/grain. Keep it clean for medical legibility.

motion.micro_interactions: Hover states on rows and buttons. Subtle scale on active cards.

images.usage_guide: Use 'doctor_portrait' for user profile placeholders. Use 'medical_team' for login page hero. Use 'office_equipment' for empty states or dashboard banners.

accessibility.contrast: WCAG AA minimum. Text must be legible against backgrounds.

universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the dashboard using the 'Bento Grid' for the overview and 'High Density Grid' for patient/order lists. Use the Navy/White color scheme strictly. Ensure all forms are validated and accessible. Use the provided image URLs for the login page and placeholders.
